description: Helmet Tetrahedrons are the adhesive reflectors on firefighter helmets.
short desc: Helmet Tetrahedrons are reflectors on firefighter helmets.
source: Sampled from an NFPA 1971-2018 compliant structural firefighting helmet.

measured property.test description: Initial-mass-normalized mass loss rate [1/s] was measured in the simultaneous thermal analyzer experiments at two heating rates: 10 K/min and 30 K/min.

derived property.test name: melting temperature and enthalpy of melting
